chapters.title: Before you start (ITR-4)
chapters.subtitle: Text guide only — portal screenshots arrive when the intern Word pack is ready.
tips: This is a text scaffold for ITR-4. Screenshot walkthrough needs the intern Word file.
warnings: Do not invent numbers. Use LastMinute compute values when unlocked.

steps.title: Open portal
steps.plainEnglish: Open the Income Tax portal in a new tab beside LastMinute.

steps.title: Confirm ITR-4
steps.clickPath: File Income Tax Return → select form
steps.plainEnglish: Only continue if LastMinute routed you to ITR-4.

chapters.title: Login and start filing
chapters.subtitle: Same login path as ITR-1; pick the correct form on the portal.

steps.title: Login
steps.plainEnglish: Sign in with PAN/Aadhaar.

steps.title: AY 2026-27 Online
steps.plainEnglish: Select AY 2026-27 and Online mode.

steps.title: Select ITR-4
steps.plainEnglish: Choose ITR-4 and proceed.

chapters.title: Presumptive business (44AD / 44ADA)
chapters.subtitle: Income Sources → Business & Profession
warnings: Cash receipts above 5% of turnover disqualify presumptive scheme.
Turnover above ₹2Cr (business) or receipts above ₹50L (profession) needs ITR-3.

steps.title: Turnover / gross receipts
steps.plainEnglish: Base figure for 44AD presumptive rate — match bank summary.

steps.title: Digital receipts percentage
steps.plainEnglish: Higher digital share qualifies for 6% rate instead of 8% under 44AD.

steps.title: Presumptive income u/s 44AD
steps.plainEnglish: 8% or 6% of turnover — our computed presumptive business profit.

steps.title: Gross professional receipts (44ADA)
steps.plainEnglish: Required when profession uses 44ADA instead of trade turnover.

steps.title: Presumptive income u/s 44ADA
steps.plainEnglish: 50% of professional receipts when 44ADA applies.

steps.title: Net business income (head total)
steps.plainEnglish: Final business head after presumptive computation.

steps.title: Detailed P&L / expense breakup
steps.plainEnglish: ITR-4 presumptive scheme does not require expense schedules.

steps.title: 44AE (goods carriage)
steps.plainEnglish: Not supported in our engine yet — consult CA if you operate goods carriages.

chapters.title: Salary (if mixed income)
chapters.subtitle: Income Sources → Salary
chapters.portalPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
warnings: ITR-4 allows salary plus presumptive business — enter salary only if Form 16 exists.
Do not skip salary when employer TDS appears in 26AS.

steps.title: Gross salary u/s 17(1)
steps.clickPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
steps.plainEnglish: Salaried side income alongside presumptive business.

steps.title: Exempt allowances u/s 10
steps.clickPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
steps.plainEnglish: HRA and LTA exemptions reduce taxable salary.

steps.title: Standard deduction u/s 16(ia)
steps.clickPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
steps.plainEnglish: Mandatory when salary schedule is active.

steps.title: Net salary income
steps.clickPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
steps.plainEnglish: Verify portal salary head matches our total.

steps.title: Entire salary schedule
steps.clickPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
steps.plainEnglish: Skip all salary fields when you had no employment income.

chapters.title: Deductions and tax benefits
chapters.subtitle: Deductions → Chapter VI-A
warnings: Business presumptive income is not an 80C investment — keep schedules separate.
New regime blocks most deductions except 80CCD(2).

steps.title: Section 80C
steps.plainEnglish: Personal tax-saving investments capped at ₹1.5 lakh.

steps.title: Section 80D
steps.plainEnglish: Health insurance premiums when old regime selected.

steps.title: Section 80CCD(1B)
steps.plainEnglish: Extra NPS deduction beyond 80C.

steps.title: Section 80CCD(2)
steps.plainEnglish: Employer NPS — available in both regimes.

steps.title: Section 80G
steps.plainEnglish: Eligible charitable donations.

steps.title: Section 80U
steps.plainEnglish: Select No when disability deduction is not claimed.

steps.title: Section 80TTA / 80TTB
steps.plainEnglish: Deselect portal default when our savings-interest deduction is zero.

chapters.title: Tax computation
chapters.subtitle: Tax Paid and Verification → Part D
chapters.portalPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
warnings: Presumptive income is fully taxable — do not subtract business expenses again in Part D.
Verify 26AS TDS on both salary and business receipts.

steps.title: Gross total income
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Salary plus presumptive business plus other heads.

steps.title: Total Chapter VI-A deductions
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Old-regime deductions before taxable income.

steps.title: Net tax payable / refund
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Amount still due or refundable after TDS credits.

steps.title: TDS on salary
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Employer TDS when salary is present.

steps.title: TDS on other income
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Bank and client TDS from 26AS.

steps.title: Advance / self-assessment tax
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Direct tax payments via challan.

steps.title: Schedule CG (capital gains)
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: ITR-4 cannot report capital gains — upgrade to ITR-2 if you sold shares or property.

chapters.title: E-verify and receipt
chapters.subtitle: Same Aadhaar OTP path as ITR-1 after preview/submit.

steps.title: Preview and submit
steps.plainEnglish: Preview totals, then submit on the portal.

steps.title: E-verify with Aadhaar OTP
steps.plainEnglish: Verify within 30 days. Download the receipt.
